newsSince: No material new company-specific news since June 9. The intended separation of the Electrification business (within ~12-18 months, all ownership options open) and the consolidation of 2D machine-vision brands under Allied Vision were both disclosed earlier in 2026. 2026 outlook is for modest organic growth after a weak Q1; no fresh separation milestone or divestment update in the window.

sources.label: TKH unveils strategy to separate Electrification (Investing.com)

verdicts.rankRationale: The catalyst (Electrification separation, machine-vision recovery, non-core divestments) is intact but no fresh milestone landed since June 9. Allied Vision consolidation and separation plan are already disclosed. High-conviction latent value-crystallization thesis unchanged; hold rank 6.
verdicts.bull: Planned Electrification separation plus machine-vision (Allied Vision/LMI) recovery can crystallize hidden AI-adjacent automation value in a sum-of-parts.
verdicts.neutral: Separation is 12-18 months out and Q1 was weak; value unlock pending concrete steps.
verdicts.bear: Execution/timing risk on separation; cyclical machine-vision and connectivity demand could delay the re-rate.
